title: caucalis hispida
intro: Caucalis hispida, also known as rough bugloss or hairy caucalis, is a plant species belonging to the family Apiaceae, commonly found in Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Caucalis hispida include its ability to relieve digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and aid in wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as an infusion or decoction, and it can also be dried and made into capsules or tinctures for easier consumption.
